section.heading: Biannual meetings of representatives of all Commissions

subsection.heading: In General.—
subsection.content: Representatives of each Commission, the Appalachian Regional Commission, and the Denali Commission shall meet biannually to discuss issues confronting regions suffering from chronic and contiguous distress and successful strategies for promoting regional development.

subsection.heading: Chair of Meetings.—
subsection.content: The chair of each meeting shall rotate among the Commissions, with the Appalachian Regional Commission to host the first meeting.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Pub. L. 110–234 and Pub. L. 110–246 enacted identical sections. Pub. L. 110–234 was repealed by section 4(a) of Pub. L. 110–246.

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section effective on the first day of the first fiscal year beginning after June 18, 2008, see section 14217(d) of Pub. L. 110–246, set out as a note under section 15101 of this title.
